Applying to 01111001
Input
0 0
1 1
2 1
3 1
4 1
5 0
6 0
7 1
Output
0 XNOR25 = XNOR(1,0) = 0
1 XNOR36 = XNOR(1,0) = 0
2 XNOR47 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
3 NOT5 = NOT(0) = 1
4 NOT6 = NOT(0) = 1
5 NOT7 = NOT(1) = 0
6 C1 = 1

\boxed{00111011}
